entries.title: Homily on Acts 45 on acts 20:36
entries.excerpt: He prayed over them while exhorting them: he shows it both by action - "And when he had thus spoken, he kneeled down, and prayed with them all" - he did not simply pray, but with much feeling: great was the consolation - and by his saying, "I commend you to the Lord."

entries.title: Commentary on Acts on acts 20:36
entries.excerpt: It should be noted that the one who is departing ought to kneel and pray with all those present, and only then depart.
